svg.title: A1×B1 on the Joget level
svg.desc: Two Joget apps (cmbb platform app and dmbb module app) sharing one PostgreSQL table space, one process, and one plugin bundle. A debt case is one cmCase row pointing to a dmDebt subject row.
svg.text: JOGET APP CENTER — two apps, one instance (jdx9)
Never changes when a module is added
• API-dmbb-data · NO process of its own
ONE POSTGRESQL TABLE SPACE (app_fd_* is instance-global)
ONE JVM — shared runtime, blind to app boundaries
all key on cmCase.id + caseType — unchanged
started FROM dmbb (menu or trigger-row form)
runs IN cmbb — same envelope for every type
behaviour differs only via mm_* config + guard packs
